title: Kingidium chibae
taxonomy: Kingidium chibae is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is a type of epiphytic orchid, which means it grows on other plants such as trees. The classification of Kingidium chibae further breaks down into the genus Kingidium and the species K. chibae, indicating its unique characteristics within the orchid family. The orchid family, Orchidaceae, is one of the largest and most diverse plant families in the world. As part of this family, Kingidium chibae is classified within the monocot division of flowering plants.
